description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, geometric-patterned roof and a two-tone exterior of light gray and white. The structure features a prominent front gate leading to a paved driveway and a small patch of green lawn on either side. The building has a partially open carport or garage area beneath the main living space, with a visible entryway and a small chimney or vent on the roof. The property is enclosed by a low, green hedge or fence, providing a clear boundary. Windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a geometric roof pattern, paved driveway, and enclosed by a green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gate, driveway, green lawn, and the open carport beneath the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the hedge enclosure, and the geometric roof pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the roof's full pattern, and the rear section of the hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, driveway extension, and the hedge boundary.
